args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" >/dev/null
verify_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- verify --bundle "$bundle_dir")
printf '%s' "$verify_out" | grep -q 'runtime-jit evidence:'
printf '%s' "$verify_out" | grep -q 'verify compile_free=true forbidden_queues=Compile,Assemble,ArtifactIo,Warmup'
printf 'verified\n'
